title: Runtime intent-conformance measurement — declared-intent exposure + per-dimension reality oracle
summary: Prior-art + tree survey for decision #1791 (gates explorer story #1698, epic #1522). #1698 wants the explorer to read a page's declared density/motion/a11y-level and flag where the rendered page diverges. Two contracts were thought undecided — Exposure (how a page declares the intents) and Reality measurement (how the oracle measures each dimension). The load-bearing finding: the EXPOSURE contract already exists and is consumed. A page declares its profile via root data-intent-* attributes — INTENT_PROFILE_ATTRS={density:'data-intent-density',mode:'data-intent-mode',motion:'data-intent-motion'} (plateau:src/dev-browser/intent-inspector/inspect.ts:11-24), read by readIntentProfile() (inspect.ts:26-33), emitted by the FUI workbench from preset.intentDefaults (fui:workbench/mount.ts:330-333). Vocabulary owned by WE intents density.json (comfortable 44px+/compact 32px/wafer 24px) and motion.json (natural/immediate/reduced). So the item's three exposure candidates collapse: data-attrs ARE the contract; #1689 DeclaredRule is the wrong layer (rule->vector linkage, not a profile — declared-rules/types.ts:35-56); a per-page manifest is a redundant parallel path. Exposure demotes from a fork to support-by-default (reuse data-intent-*). Reality-measurement prior art: WCAG 2.5.8 target-size 24px (AA) / 2.5.5 44px (AAA) map onto density.json's bands, so density reality = geometric hit-box measurement vs the declared floor (catches CSS overrides a token re-read misses); motion reality = re-render under emulated prefers-reduced-motion:reduce and flag still-active non-semantic animation (View Transitions don't auto-respect it — conformance-vectors/slide-transition-reduced-motion); a11y reality already collected via axe (Observation.a11yViolations, plateau:tools/explorer/oracles/observation.ts:39-46). RULED (#1791, 2026-06-26) by a layer split: this is a UX-intent-conformance oracle over density+motion only. (1) a11y-level is NOT an intent — a WCAG conformance tier is a technical platform-config value (three-layer carve #1780/#1702), emitted on the #1689 conformance channel (kind:conformance+tier), measured absolutely by axe; the declared-relative overclaim is a conformance-lane follow-up (#1805, maturityGated). (2) reality fields extend the existing Observation (field-count != schema-coupling, #1662). (3) density metric = spacing/whitespace ratio (touch-target floor refuted: re-badges WCAG/axe, and is the a11y layer leaking into a UX measurement), gated on quantified spacing bands in density.json (#1804). Constellation: WE owns the vocabulary/bands contract, the plateau explorer owns the measurer (#1467). Latent inconsistency flagged: motion.json (natural/immediate/reduced) vs manifest.ts (full/reduced/none) — both share 'reduced' so #1698 is unblocked. Full grounding: reports/2026-06-26-runtime-intent-conformance-measurement.md.
